targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time_bucket('1 minute'::interval, pd.time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS time,
  COALESCE(pm.name, CONCAT(pm.ip_address, ' ', pm.probe_id)) AS metric,
  AVG((pd.value)::float) * 1e9 AS value
FROM castdb.probe_data pd
JOIN castdb.probe_metadata pm ON pd.probe_uuid = pm.uuid
JOIN castdb.metric_type mt ON pd.metric_type_uuid = mt.uuid
WHERE $__timeFilter(pd.time)
  AND pm.vendor = 'NTP'
  AND mt.name = 'Phase Offset'
  AND pm.uuid IN (${ntp_probe:sqlstring})
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  time_bucket('1 minute'::interval, pd.time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS time,
  COALESCE(pm.name, CONCAT(pm.ip_address, ' ', pm.probe_id)) AS metric,
  AVG((pd.value)::float) * 1e9 AS value
FROM castdb.probe_data pd
JOIN castdb.probe_metadata pm ON pd.probe_uuid = pm.uuid
JOIN castdb.metric_type mt ON pd.metric_type_uuid = mt.uuid
WHERE $__timeFilter(pd.time)
  AND pm.vendor = 'NTP'
  AND mt.name = 'NTP Jitter'
  AND pm.uuid IN (${ntp_probe:sqlstring})
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  time_bucket('1 minute'::interval, pd.time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS time,

WHERE $__timeFilter(pd.time)
  AND pm.vendor = 'NTP'
  AND mt.name = 'NTP Stratum'
  AND pm.uuid IN (${ntp_probe:sqlstring})
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  time_bucket('1 minute'::interval, pd.time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS time,
  COALESCE(pm.name, CONCAT(pm.ip_address, ' ', pm.probe_id)) AS metric,
  AVG((pd.value)::float) AS value
FROM castdb.probe_data pd
JOIN castdb.probe_metadata pm ON pd.probe_uuid = pm.uuid
JOIN castdb.metric_type mt ON pd.metric_type_uuid = mt.uuid
WHERE $__timeFilter(pd.time)
  AND pm.vendor = 'NTP'
  AND mt.name = 'NTP Sync Health'
  AND pm.uuid IN (${ntp_probe:sqlstring})
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT uuid AS __value, COALESCE(name, CONCAT(ip_address, ' ', probe_id)) AS __text FROM castdb.probe_metadata WHERE vendor = 'NTP' ORDER BY 2
list.name: ntp_probe
list.query: SELECT uuid AS __value, COALESCE(name, CONCAT(ip_address, ' ', probe_id)) AS __text FROM castdb.probe_metadata WHERE vendor = 'NTP' ORDER BY 2
